things.name: Fort Rotterdam
things.description: 1607 Dutch colonial fort with two museums of South Sulawesi history and ethnography

things.name: Tana Toraja Funeral Ceremonies
things.description: 8-hour drive to Tana Toraja - extraordinary cliff graves and elaborate funeral rites

things.name: Losari Beach Sunset
things.description: Iconic sunset promenade with the floating mosque and traditional Makassar seafood

things.name: Bugis Schooner Port (Pelabuhan Paotere)
things.description: Traditional wooden Bugis Phinisi ships - the world's last working wooden cargo fleet

things.name: Sulawesi Exhibition at Balla Lompoa Palace
things.description: Gowa Kingdom royal regalia including the magnificent royal crown

things.name: Bantimurung Waterfall
things.description: Karst limestone waterfall park where Alfred Russel Wallace collected butterflies

things.name: Samalona Island Day Trip
things.description: Snorkelling on the coral reef 10km offshore

things.name: Leang-Leang Cave Paintings
things.description: 35,000-year-old cave paintings - possibly the world's oldest figurative art

things.name: Karebosi Square
things.description: Central public square with views of the Makassar cityscape

things.name: Coto Makassar (Beef Offal Soup)
things.description: Makassar's famous spiced offal soup eaten with ketupat rice cake
